note: Registry of research artifacts whose content must never change silently. Entries record a path relative to the repo root and its frozen sha256. These artifacts are gitignored (generated data), so this registry is the only tracked guard against accidental overwrite by a later run. Absence of the file on disk is not a failure (a clean checkout has no data_derived/ at all); a content mismatch is.
